case_number: criminal bail applications bearing No. S-968

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1254 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 26.01.2026 Mr. Allah Dino Kubar, Advocate for applicants. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicants are present on interim pre-arrest bail. Learned DPG states that both the criminal bail applications bearing No. S-968 and 1163 of 2025 in the same crime pertaining to the co-accused have already been granted, and the applicants have similar role. Although copies of the same are not being brought up, as both the learned Counsels are stating so, the order dated 29.12.2025, whereby the applicants were granted interim pre- arrest bail, stands confirmed. Bail application stands disposed of accordingly. J U D G E Abdul Basit
